title: JustCreate
description: Fabric 1.20.1 | Create mod with over than 19 its addons!
body:
**Create mechanisms with mod create and 19 addons**

[Discrod:3]([https://discord.gg/ufDjUfNh](https://discord.gg/eMHPhhuhjV))

![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d26f826afff811a506edcbb7ebc249caf341af6b.png)

This modpack adds create and its addons, which diversify the mod and the game. The modpack also adds the mods Farmers Delight, [Lets do], Naturalist and others.
